tasks.subject: Task 1: Implicit winner branch in computeExcludedRegionalPaths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When winnerPrefix and seedPrefix are both null, find the FR-shaped alt with the lowest region_priority (undefined treated as worst), treat it as the implicit winner, and exclude only the other alternates.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.ts:270-293
- Test: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts (append cases A-G)

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Existing 9 cases pass","Case A excluded=[]","Case B excluded=[/de,/en]","Case C /fr-FR wins","Case D first-FR wins","Case E /de,/en excluded","Case F regression","Case G empty","Build clean"]}
```
